user.title: Shelly 3EM Smart Monitor
user.description: Enter the host and port of the running Shelly 3EM Smart Monitor add-on (default: localhost:8080).

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the add-on at that address. Make sure it's running and the host/port are correct.

abort.already_configured: This add-on instance is already configured.

init.title: Tracked entities
init.description: Pick the Home Assistant entities whose on/off transitions you want to use to teach the add-on. Each time one of these entities changes state, its timestamp is sent to the add-on and correlated against detected power-step events. After 3 confident matches, the entity is automatically promoted to a labelled device.
